name: Thread the Needle
description: Start on hands and knees (tabletop). Reach one arm under your body toward the opposite side, lowering that shoulder and temple to the floor. The other arm can stay planted or reach overhead for a deeper stretch. Hold for a breath, then reverse and open that arm to the ceiling for a twist. Alternate sides fluidly. Excellent thoracic spine rotation and lat stretch — great prep for pulling movements.
